issues.description: Effect text states 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' which indicates a duration constraint, not a permanent Rest. Should include duration:'UntilEndOfOpponentNextEndPhase' or similar. Current DSL applies Rest without duration, implying permanent effect.
